description:
secretx-core/src/lib.rs:479,488,495,502,507,517,522: seven sites of the form 'chars.peek().map(|c| c.is_ascii_digit()).unwrap_or(false)'. The byte-based mirror at lib.rs:914-963 (skip_number_b) uses 'bytes.get(pos).is_some_and(u8::is_ascii_digit)' — the idiomatic form.

Inconsistency between the two scanners that share a stated maintenance contract is worth fixing. clippy::pedantic flags all seven (called map(<f>).unwrap_or(false) on an Option value).

Fix: replace each with chars.peek().is_some_and(|c| c.is_ascii_digit()) — note .copied() not needed here because is_some_and's closure receives &T, and we don't move it.

Same for the redundant-closure warnings clippy emits on the same lines — once the lint is fixed by switching to is_some_and, those go away too.
title: Char-based json_skip_number uses map().unwrap_or(false) instead of is_some_and
